meta.name: timeline-pulse source families
meta.note: Registry of the source families reports may reference via source.source_id. Individual source URLs live on reports and events, not here.

source_families.label: CERN official pages
source_families.policy: Primary source for every official-science event. Always linked, never paraphrased into metaphysics.

source_families.label: Alchemical source family
source_families.policy: A family of symbolic/alchemical teachings summarized in project-original wording. By project policy its teacher is not publicly named anywhere in this repository; claims from it are always graded symbolic and flagged do-not-state-as-fact. See docs/SOURCE_POLICY.md, 'Omitted-teacher rule'.

source_families.label: Community forums & threads
source_families.policy: Long-form community discussion (forums, subreddits, comment archives). Stored as summaries plus metadata; short excerpts only when clearly allowed.

source_families.label: Social platforms
source_families.policy: Public posts (X, YouTube, TikTok, blogs). URL + summary preferred over copied text; deleted or private content is not archived.

source_families.label: Project notes
source_families.policy: Curator-authored syntheses and digests. Transparent about being maintainer-written; speculative connections are flagged.
